creator: bkoenig@alpha-tierchen.de
text:
Horance Chou gave me the permission to take the maintainership. Please
change the maintainer's mail address of the port accordingly.

Björn


------------------------ Original Message --------------------------------
Subject: Re: FreeBSD port: devel/libffi
From:    "Horance Chou" <horance@freera.net>
Date:    So, 17.02.2008, 06:12
To:      Björn König <bkoenig@alpha-tierchen.de>
--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Hello,

It's a great news :)
please take the maintainership,
thanks a lot!

-- 
Regards,
    Horance

On 2/15/08, Björn König <bkoenig@alpha-tierchen.de> wrote:
>
> Hello,
>
> I'm the maintainer of the FreeBSD port devel/libffi-devel and I want to
> inform you that libffi 2.99.7 has been released yesterday.
>
> http://sources.redhat.com/libffi/
>
> Are you still interested in maintaining the port devel/libffi or can I
> take the maintainership otherwise?
>
> Regards
> Björn König
>
>
>
